Description: Define your entire Umbraco structure — DataTypes, DocumentTypes, Templates, Content, Media, Languages, Dictionary Items, Members, and Users — in a single YAML file. The plugin reads it on startup and builds everything automatically. Infrastructure-as-Code for Umbraco 17.

AuthorDetails.Name: Carlos Casalicchio
AuthorDetails.Description: Developer at SplatDev. Building tools to make Umbraco development faster and more reproducible.

RelatedPackages.Description: Companion package — exports your existing Umbraco site structure to YAML. v2.x supports Umbraco 14-17, v1.x supports Umbraco 13.

Screenshots.Caption: YAML configuration — Umbraco structures, created automatically at startup
How it works: 4-step process from YAML file to live Umbraco site
